---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new idea for the neon grid.
title: "[FEATURE] - "
labels: enhancement
assignees: afifashamsadvivo
---

### 🌟 What is your grand idea?
Describe the feature you want to see. Should the buttons glow more? Should we add more "cyberpunk" colors?

### 🤖 Why would a human want this?
Explain how this makes the verification experience even better for carbon-based lifeforms.

### 🎨 Visual Concept (Optional)
If you have a mockup or a sketch of how this futuristic feature should look, drop it here.

### 📝 Extra Vibes
Anything else we should know before we start coding the future?
